name: Alchemy
description: Web3 development platform providing RPC nodes, APIs, and blockchain infrastructure services.

name: Infura
description: Ethereum and IPFS API suite by ConsenSys providing scalable blockchain infrastructure.

name: QuickNode
description: Multi-chain Web3 infrastructure provider with fast RPC endpoints and developer tools.

name: Ankr
description: Decentralized Web3 infrastructure provider offering RPC endpoints across 45+ blockchains.

name: Chainstack
description: Managed blockchain infrastructure platform with elastic RPC nodes and dedicated endpoints.

name: Blast API
description: Decentralized API platform providing fast and reliable blockchain RPC access.

name: dRPC
description: Decentralized RPC network aggregating node providers for reliable blockchain access.

name: Helius
description: Solana-focused RPC and API provider with enhanced transaction and NFT data endpoints.

name: Triton
description: High-performance Solana RPC infrastructure operated by Triton One for validators and dApps.

name: Syndica
description: Solana infrastructure provider offering RPC nodes and blockchain data APIs.

name: The Graph
description: Decentralized indexing protocol for querying blockchain data using GraphQL subgraphs.

name: Goldsky
description: High-performance blockchain data indexing platform with real-time streaming pipelines.

name: Subsquid
description: Decentralized data lake and indexing framework for blockchain data across 100+ networks.

name: Envio
description: Fast multi-chain indexing framework with auto-generated GraphQL APIs and HyperSync.

name: Covalent
description: Unified blockchain data API providing indexed data across 200+ chains via single endpoint.

name: Moralis
description: Web3 data API platform providing token, NFT, wallet, and DeFi data across major chains.

name: Bitquery
description: Blockchain data platform with GraphQL APIs covering DEX trades, transfers, and smart contracts.

name: Hardhat
description: Ethereum development environment for compiling, testing, and deploying smart contracts.

name: Foundry
description: Blazing-fast Ethereum toolkit written in Rust with Forge testing and Cast CLI.

name: Remix
description: Browser-based Solidity IDE for writing, compiling, and deploying Ethereum smart contracts.

name: Tenderly
description: Web3 development platform with transaction simulation, debugging, and monitoring tools.

name: Brownie
description: Python-based smart contract development and testing framework for Ethereum.

name: Anchor
description: Solana smart contract framework providing Rust macros and IDL-based client generation.

name: Privy
description: Web3 authentication and embedded wallet SDK enabling email and social login for dApps.

name: Dynamic
description: Web3 onboarding platform with multi-wallet authentication and embedded wallet support.

name: Web3Auth
description: Pluggable wallet infrastructure using MPC for social login-based key management.

name: Magic
description: SDK for passwordless Web3 authentication with email, social, and SMS-based wallet creation.

name: Particle Network
description: Chain abstraction and wallet-as-a-service platform with universal accounts across chains.

name: Turnkey
description: Secure key management infrastructure using hardware-backed private key storage for Web3.

name: Dfns
description: MPC-based wallet infrastructure API for building custodial and non-custodial wallet solutions.

name: Capsule
description: Embedded wallet SDK using MPC for seamless onboarding with passkey and social login.

name: Slither
description: Static analysis framework for Solidity smart contracts detecting vulnerabilities and code issues.

name: Mythril
description: Symbolic execution tool for detecting security vulnerabilities in EVM bytecode.

name: Echidna
description: Property-based fuzzer for Ethereum smart contracts written in Haskell by Trail of Bits.

name: Medusa
description: Parallelized smart contract fuzzer inspired by Echidna with cross-platform Go implementation.

name: Certora Prover
description: Formal verification tool for proving correctness properties of smart contracts mathematically.

name: OpenZeppelin
description: Standard library of secure, audited smart contract templates for Ethereum development.

name: Thirdweb
description: Full-stack Web3 development platform with smart contract deployment and frontend SDKs.

name: Wagmi
description: React hooks library for Ethereum providing type-safe interactions with wallets and contracts.

name: Viem
description: TypeScript interface for Ethereum providing lightweight and type-safe blockchain interactions.

name: Ethers.js
description: Lightweight JavaScript library for interacting with the Ethereum blockchain and smart contracts.
